task_completion.description: Log in to OpenCAD as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., admin user profile or welcome message).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Data Manager and view departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Manager page is open, specifically showing the list or table of departments.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the 'San Andreas Highway Patrol' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit modal or edit page is open for the department originally named 'San Andreas Highway Patrol' with the short name 'SAHP'.

task_completion.description: Change the department name and short name to the new values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields in the edit form show 'Haul Road Patrol' for the Full Department Name and 'HRP' for the Short Name (Abbreviation).

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the department was edited in place.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The department list now displays 'Haul Road Patrol' with the short name 'HRP'. The entry should appear in the same relative position or have the same ID (ID 3) as the original, showing it was edited rather than added as a new row.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenCAD web interface in a browser, not terminal commands executing SQL queries directly.

integrity.description: The agent edited the department in place rather than deleting and recreating it.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the deletion of the 'San Andreas Highway Patrol' department or the 'Create New Department' form being used.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local OpenCAD URL, and the interface matches a genuine web application rather than a static text file or mock HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target department to edit originally has the long name 'San Andreas Highway Patrol' and short name 'SAHP' (Database ID 3). The expected new long name is 'Haul Road Patrol' and the new short name is 'HRP'. The edit must be done in place using the application's edit functionality; deleting the original and creating a new one is a failure of the task constraints.
